examples.title: Algorithm: Median Filter
examples.description: Nonlinear filter replacing pixel with neighborhood median
examples.code:
ALGORITHM MedianFilter
INPUT: image, kernelSize
OUTPUT: filteredImage

BEGIN
 FOR each pixel in image
 neighborhood = getNeighborhood(pixel, kernelSize)
 sortedNeighborhood = sort(neighborhood)
 median = getMiddleValue(sortedNeighborhood)
 filteredImage[pixel] = median
 END FOR
END
examples.explanation: Step-by-step explanation of the median filter algorithm

examples.title: Python: Median Filter
examples.description: Implementation of median filter using OpenCV
examples.code:
import cv2
import numpy as np

# Read image
image = cv2.imread('input.jpg', cv2.IMREAD_GRAYSCALE)

# Apply median filter
filteredImage = cv2.medianBlur(image, 3)

# Save result
cv2.imwrite('filtered.jpg', filteredImage)
examples.explanation: Key implementation details and how it relates to the concept
